impact: param_plafond has land_id + FK to dim_land, but param_rsz has no country dimension. RSZ is BE-only per POC scope (Constitution + N-004 undecided), so no active bug. However, when N-004 is decided AND non-BE RSZ data is imported, the exclusion constraint (status, werkgeverscategorie, daterange) will incorrectly block cross-country rows with the same tuple. Fix requires: (a) add land_id NOT NULL column + FK to dim_land, (b) backfill 'BE' for existing rows, (c) extend exclusion key with land_id, (d) add pgTAP cross-country lives_ok. Deferred until N-004 resolution.
title: param_rsz has no land_id — asymmetric with param_plafond, blocks future multi-country RSZ
